# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: authorization.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservices-authz
spec:
  clients:
    - name: frontend
      services:
        - port: 80
          rules:
            - allowedPaths:
                - "/api"
              authentication:
                - issuer:
                    name: backend
              authorization:
                - issuer:
                    name: backend
    - name: backend
      services:
        - port: 8080
          rules:
            - allowedPaths:
                - "/data"
              authorization:
                - issuer:
                    name: frontend

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  # Replace the service account name below with the appropriate value
  serviceAccountName: linkerd-server
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
